root_text.sn33.4:1.2: Ekamantaṁ nisinno kho vacchagotto paribbājako bhagavantaṁ etadavoca:
root_text.sn33.4:1.3: “ko nu kho, bho gotama, hetu, ko paccayo, yānimāni anekavihitāni diṭṭhigatāni loke uppajjanti—
root_text.sn33.4:1.4: sassato lokoti vā, asassato lokoti vā …pe…
root_text.sn33.4:1.5: neva hoti na na hoti tathāgato paraṁ maraṇāti vā”ti?
root_text.sn33.4:1.6: “Saṅkhāresu kho, vaccha, aññāṇā, saṅkhārasamudaye aññāṇā, saṅkhāranirodhe aññāṇā, saṅkhāranirodhagāminiyā paṭipadāya aññāṇā;
root_text.sn33.4:1.8: sassato lokoti vā, asassato lokoti vā …pe…
root_text.sn33.4:1.9: neva hoti na na hoti tathāgato paraṁ maraṇāti vāti.
root_text.sn33.4:1.10: Ayaṁ kho, vaccha, hetu, ayaṁ paccayo, yānimāni anekavihitāni diṭṭhigatāni loke uppajjanti—
root_text.sn33.4:1.11: sassato lokoti vā, asassato lokoti vā …pe…
root_text.sn33.4:1.12: neva hoti na na hoti tathāgato paraṁ maraṇāti vā”ti.

translation_text.sn33.4:1.2: Then the wanderer Vacchagotta said to the Buddha:
translation_text.sn33.4:1.3: “What is the cause, worthy Gotama, what is the reason why these various misconceptions arise in the world? …”
translation_text.sn33.4:1.6: “Vaccha, it is because of not knowing choices, their origin, their cessation, and the practice that leads to their cessation …”
